basics.name: Haoran Xin
basics.summary: Ph.D. student in Artificial Intelligence at HKUST(GZ), researching Recommender Systems, Large Language Models, and Data Mining.

work.summary: Large-scale generative models for advertising prediction and ad delivery optimization.
Large-scale user behavior and spatiotemporal data processing. Applied cutting-edge technologies to map, feed, intelligent transportation, and other businesses.

education.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (Guangzhou)
University of Science and Technology of China
education.area: MPhil in Data Science (Computer Science and Technology)
B.Eng. in Computer Science and Technology
